is a practical question — let’s answer it in a way you can deploy. ## The practical deployment path (Lighthouse). If you want a clean, reproducible setup, the most efficient route is the OpenClaw application template on Tencent Cloud Lighthouse. 2. **Select**: Choose **OpenClaw (Clawdbot)** under the **AI Agents** application template. For step-by-step screenshots and the full panel + onboarding flow, use the deployment guide: https://www.tencentcloud.com/techpedia/139184. Even if the template handles day-one setup, you still need a repeatable way to configure models, connect channels, install skills, and keep the gateway alive. # One-time onboarding (interactive) # Keep the agent running as a background service whoami export id. * Installing OpenClaw Skills and practical applications. Deploy one instance, connect one channel, add one skill, and run one workflow for a week. When you are ready to run it 24/7 in a clean, isolated environment, start here again: Tencent Cloud Lighthouse Special Offer. The big wins are boring: repeatable setup, predictable inputs, and clear failure paths.

title: 🦞 Discord - OpenClaw Docs
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

# Discord. # ​ Discord (Bot API). ## Channel troubleshooting. ## ​ Quick setup. Create a Discord application and bot. `openclaw config set channels.discord.token '"YOUR_BOT_TOKEN"' --json. openclaw config set channels.discord.enabled true --json. openclaw pairing approve discord <CODE>`. ## ​ Recommended: Set up a guild workspace. ## ​ Runtime model. `agent:<agentId>:discord:channel:<channelId>`. `channels.discord.dm.groupEnabled=false`. `agent:<agentId>:discord:slash:<userId>`. ## ​ Forum channels. `openclaw message send --channel discord --target channel:<forumId> \. `openclaw message thread create --channel discord --target channel:<forumId> \. ## ​ Interactive components. `channels.discord.accounts.default.allowFrom`. `channels.discord.accounts.default.allowFrom`. ## ​ Native commands and command auth. `channels.discord.dms["<user_id>"].historyLimit`. `channels.discord.accounts.<accountId>.ackReaction`. | reactions, messages, threads, pins, polls, search, memberInfo, roleInfo, channelInfo, channels, voiceStatus, events, stickers, emojiUploads, stickerUploads, permissions | enabled |. ## ​ Components v2 UI. `channels.discord.ui.components.accentColor`. `channels.discord.accounts.<id>.ui.components.accentColor`. ## ​ Voice channels. `channels.discord.voice.enabled=false`. ## ​ Voice messages. `message(action="send", channel="discord", target="channel:123", path="/path/to/audio.mp3", asVoice=true)`. ## ​ Troubleshooting. `channels.discord.accounts.<accountId>.eventQueue.listenerTimeout`. `channels.discord.dm.enabled=false`. `channels.discord.voice.daveEncryption=true`. `channels.discord.voice.decryptionFailureTolerance=24`. `discord voice: DAVE decrypt failures detected`. `discord voice: repeated decrypt failures; attempting rejoin`. ## ​ Configuration reference pointers. ## ​ Safety and operations. ## ​ Related.

title: 🦞 From Chat App to AI Powerhouse: Telegram + OpenClaw - Medium
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

In this guide, we’ll walk through how to install OpenClaw on macOS and connect it to Telegram step by step. OpenClaw is a self-hosted AI assistant that runs locally on your machine while connecting to messaging platforms like Telegram, WhatsApp, Discord, and more. Before connecting OpenClaw to Telegram, we first need to install it locally. After entering your API key, OpenClaw verifies it and automatically configures a default model. ## Step 5: Connect OpenClaw to Telegram. After configuring your model, OpenClaw will ask you to select a chat channel. After selecting **Telegram (Bot API)** as your channel, OpenClaw will prompt you to enter your Telegram bot token. After entering your Telegram bot token, OpenClaw finalizes the channel configuration. After completing the configuration, OpenClaw installs and starts the **Gateway service**. Messages sent to your Telegram bot are routed through the OpenClaw Gateway, processed by your selected model, and returned in real time.

title: 🦞 openclaw-cron | Skills Marketplace - LobeHub
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

OpenClaw Cron Manager provides a safe CLI wrapper to create, list, run, enable/disable and manage OpenClaw cron jobs without editing configuration files. It supports cron expressions (5-field), interval scheduling (--every 10m, 1h, 1d), one-time runs (--at +20m or ISO timestamps), timezone handling (--tz), job lifecycle options (delete-after-run, enable/disable), immediate test runs, and announcement integrations (channels like Telegram). `Curl https://lobehub.com/skills/liuzln-openclaw-skills-openclaw-cron/skill.md, then follow the instructions to setup LobeHub Skills Marketplace and install the skill read the SKILL.md file in the installed directory, and follow its instructions to complete the task.`. Safe management of OpenClaw cron jobs without touching configuration files. ### List all cron jobs. `openclaw cron run <job-id>`. `openclaw cron disable <job-id>. openclaw cron enable <job-id>`. `openclaw cron run <job-id>`. `openclaw cron runs <job-id>`. `openclaw cron edit <job-id> --name "新名称". openclaw cron edit <job-id> --cron "0 10 * * *". openclaw cron edit <job-id> --disabled`. `openclaw cron disable <job-id>. openclaw cron enable <job-id>`. `openclaw cron rm <job-id>`.

title: 🦞 OpenClaw: Setting Up Cron Jobs for Autonomous AI Task Scheduling
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

OpenClaw: Agentic AI for Developers. # Setting Up Cron Jobs. Explore how to configure cron jobs in OpenClaw to enable your AI assistant to perform scheduled tasks autonomously. Understand the difference between main session and isolated modes, learn to create, manage, and debug cron jobs, and discover practical uses like morning briefings and reminders. * How to create a cron job? * What are some practical jobs to set up? * How do I check, edit, and manage jobs? Cron jobs are the mechanism that makes this possible. They allow you to schedule your agent to execute tasks on a fixed rotation. Cron runs inside the Gateway, not inside the model. That distinction matters: your scheduled jobs persist across restarts, survive model changes, and do not depend on you having an active conversation. Jobs are stored at `~/.openclaw/cron/jobs.json` and run history is logged per-job. If your Gateway is running, your cron jobs are running. Every cron job runs in one of two modes, and choosing the right one matters.

title: 🦞 OpenClaw cron scheduler guide for proactive automations
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

Cron is for tasks that need a precise schedule or tasks you want to keep out of your main conversation history. Heartbeat handles the recurring background checks and cron handles “at a specific time” and “run this job in isolation.”. OpenClaw keeps cron job definitions on disk and it keeps per-run history separately. OpenClaw cron supports three scheduling patterns and you pick based on the job you’re building. A main session cron job drops a system event into your main session then the agent processes it with full context. A cron job can run and do nothing visible or it can deliver output to a channel. ## Creating cron jobs via chat. The agent can convert that into a cron schedule plus an isolated message payload plus delivery targeting. Create an isolated cron job with a cron expression like `0 7 * * *` and set announce delivery to your preferred channel and target. ### Why did my cron job not run?
